description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image and three stages: build, test, and acceptance_test. In the build stage add a go_build job that runs `go build ./...` and a lint job that installs golangci-lint via `curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/golangci/golangci-lint/master/install.sh | sh -s -- -b $(go env GOPATH)/bin`, then runs `go build ./...` and `golangci-lint run ./...`. In the test stage add a unit_test job that installs Ginkgo with `go install github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2/ginkgo@v2.4.0`, runs `ginkgo -r --randomize-all --randomize-suites --fail-on-pending --cover --trace --progress`, executes `go test -coverprofile=cover.out ./...`, generates a coverage summary with `go tool cover -func=cover.out > coverage.out` and displays it using `tail coverage.out`. In the acceptance_test stage add deterministic_test, single_gpu_test, two_discrete_gpu_test, two_unified_gpu_test, four_discrete_gpu_test, and four_unified_gpu_test jobs, each changing to the appropriate test directory, building with `go build`, and running the acceptance binary with the specified `-num-gpu` and unified GPU flags; all these jobs are tagged with `multi_core`.
